hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *.py) cd /Users/jesseceresphoenix/Documents/agent_swarm/backend && .venv/bin/ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null && .venv/bin/ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null;; *.ts|*.tsx) export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && eval "$(fnm env)" && cd /Users/jesseceresphoenix/Documents/agent_swarm/frontend && npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null;; esac; fi; true
